title: Multi-tenant mixed shared + tenant schemas
prompt: In a multi-tenant app, most business tables live in per-tenant Postgres schemas but shared reference data (e.g. currency codes, supported languages) live in a main schema. Write: (1) MyApp.Tenants.Order with `@schema_prefix "tenant_data"` (lib/my_app/tenants/order.ex), (2) MyApp.Shared.Currency with `@schema_prefix "main"` (lib/my_app/shared/currency.ex). Both have minimal fields plus UTC timestamps.
tier_rationale: Two schemas with distinct @schema_prefix values. Hard because recognizing the shared/tenant split requires domain reasoning.
research_citation: Ecto Multi-tenancy guide: 'schema_prefix where shared data can be stored in a main prefix.'
